description: a BLACK HILLS UNION ART W GIRD Publisher RAPID CITY SOUTH DAKOTA SOUTH DAKOTA NEWS The wheat crop of Yankton county promises to excel previous years Fig ured on a bisis of sixteen bushels per acre gives Yankton countys wheat crop at 1280000 bushels The seventh annual convention of the South Dakota conference Epworth league will be held at Redfleld August 31 to September 4 The outlook is for a large and enthusiastic attend ance One of the heaviest rain hail and wind storms of the season swept over StUrgis last week The wind played havoc with the outskirts of the town the hail beat crops into the ground and the rain filled all the streams bank full Much damage was dene in the country The big chime whistle of Rapid Citys mammoth chlorination plant now greets the ear of the people of that lty and has greatly encouraged busi ness interests there The big plant will begin operations on August 15 with a force of 120 men per day treating 100 tons of gold ore every twentyfour hours The Dead woodTerra shaft house owned by the Homestake company of Lead burned to the ground a fsw days ago The
